abilities.name: Taking Aim
abilities.description: When this character gains the Focused Condition, it lasts until the start of its next turn.

abilities.name: Stand and Fire
abilities.description: When an enemy declares a Charge within line of sight, reduce Focused by 1 to deal 2 damage per point of Focused.

actions: (1) Hunting Knife (Melee) | AV: 4 (10) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage.

(1) Sniper Rifle (Long Arms) | AV: 6 (12) | Rg: z14 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/4/7 damage. Range increased by +10 per + from Focused. Ram Critical Strike: +1 damage per Ram. Capacity 4, Reload 1.
system.notes: Elite marksmen trained in target selection and long-range shooting.
